transcript.text:
*Exos Heroes (Mobile Game) X Mukbang Streamer Tzuyang Collaboration
*1 Month After "Tzuyang's Game Character Competition" Started
Thank you so much for submitting so many drawings for this competition
It was so hard for me to choose the winner
*Variety of ideas sent by Tzuyang's fans
Art Director: We have to gather all of the submissions
*Gather everything together!
Some of them are impossible to be implemented in our game..
*Ya'll play too much!
Wow this one is super nice
I didn't get picked!? NO! (She also applied for the competition)
*A Chef comes in out of nowhere?
*One of the best working environment provided
*Draws 1 line, Eats 1 bite
You have to start drawing
Oh, Right..

*Exos Heroes (Mobile Game) X Mukbang Streamer Tzuyang Collaboration To Eat or To Draw? That is the question..
Hello, how have you been?
Hello, it's been a while
Did we receive a lot of drawings? Yes, so many submissions
We will see which ones we like
and think about how we will implement it into different actions like skills
Fate core skill
We will have to have a meeting on this
About this much
*Around 500 submissions
It will take us forever to check everything
Wait, it's getting really weird already
*Skill: By pressing the Bell, the restaurant owner comes to help and flips the ground just like how the KBBQ grill is flipped
*Good Idea!
I really like the Bell idea
*A different idea from the same person: Tzurannosaurus(?)

*Skill: Meat-eating Tzurannosaurus blows flames to cook the enemies for Mukbang!
*Skill: Tzuyang will eat Korean steak and transform into a Korean cow. At the same time, armored cows will rampage down the enemies
*Skill: Tzuyang will eat chicken, transforms into a chicken costume and flies into the air to shoot feather missiles
This is really fun
You guys are the funny ones here
This one is cruel
*Skill: Tzuyang mixes the enemies in her Spaghetti and she eats it..
This is like the Attack on Titan
Tzuyang, your fans are very creative
Oh, tie the enemies up with handmade-noodles
Tie them up and slam them on the ground
It would have been PG-rated if it wasn't for the slamming part..
*Slam!
King Tomahawk Steak Boomerang?
Eat after it returns
*Skill: Throws the King Tomahawk Steak Boomerang to eliminate the enemy, eat the steak after it returns.

*Carefully checking all of the fan's submissions for 3 hours
Viewers: Please Like and Subscribe!
There are buffs when you use the Like and Subscribe skill
Can you do 1 as an example?
Like..
*Like and Subscribe Please!
Okay, I will
*Skill: Bite down a bite of Black Bean Noodles and Swing head to damage the enemies with the noodles
*Shocked
Spray the sauce on their bodies to slow their movement speed
Attacking that(?) spot..?
*She loves it
*Fake Cough to calm down
*Why is she here!?
Why did you send this!?
*Do you guys remember?

*Current Animator's Submission: Skill: Salary Thief
*Salary Thief
Please Explain
Explain this yourself
Really didn't know she would submit that. How can you do such a thing sober?
But mine looks more like you than the other submissions
*Not Sober...
*Next up: Angler Fish
I'm not sure how it will sound, But the Angler fish will eat all the enemies
And then Tzuyang will eat the fish
*Nice idea
*You're not a salary thief
That was PG-rated and very nice
PG-rated...?!
*OMG
That's Jingu. My cat!

These ideas are really funny
It was somewhat light but it was very entertaining
I was surprised that so many people really put their thought and time into this
I saw really nice ones even as a character creator
I can already start working on the character with these
We will get together to pick the best 3
*Final Overview
*Who will be our Top 3 from the hundreds of submissions?
*3rd place:
*2nd place:
*1st place:
A character that best suits our concept and is within the realm of our game and capacity
We found our winner
*1st place:
There's no way!
I thought mine will be picked for at least 2nd place

I am very disappointed I have lots of mixed emotions about this company..(?)
*Time to take her pills
If you would do your best to draw this out, we will finish it off with some light editing
*Pressure
I will go ahead and get started
*Starts off with the face
*Showing off her hidden skills finally!?
Tzuyang, aren't you hungry?
I'm starving..
You enjoyed the food so much the last time you came to our place
So our boss was really happy
*Boss: Believe it or not...
I hired a personal chef for you today
Wow, really?
So that you are able to eat while you work
Hello~

*Today's chef that is responsible for Tzuyang's belly
This is for about 30 people
I brought plenty because I'm serving Tzuyang
I'm a happy camper
*Tzuyang's favorite menu: Tuna Sashimi
Can I start eating? Yes!
Thank you!
It tastes so good
Let's eat together!
I can't. I have enteritis
Don't mind me at all, just dig in
Well in that case.. *I'll just EAT
Aren't you going to work?
Oh, right!
*Concentrating on her drawing again
*I can't resist Tuna

Mr. Chef, can you also do sushi? Yes, of course
Work please?
Yes sir!
*Working hard
This is already more than what I expect tbh
*Busy Busy
*His hands are constantly moving
*Tzuyang's mouth is constantly moving
*Making vs. Eating
*Busy Busy
*Almost finishing up her work
Are you going to eat more sushi?
Yes!
She's eating so fast!
*Tzuyang, let's just eat first
How many is this?

*Brain fart!
12, 13, 15...
This is about 30 pieces
Bon appetit!
*Mukbang Start!
*Mukbang Finished..
*Cleared
Oh no, where did my work go?
It's never been this hard making sushi for 1 person
So the silhouette sketch is finished, right?
Now you can start on focusing on the details like the creese of the clothing and shading
Okay, I got it
*Work is almost coming to an end
*Fuel almost empty..
I will cut up some special pieces for Tzuyang so she can get some rest
*Tuna Nose Meat

*Tuna Head Meat
*Thank you!
I have to go open my restaurant now
Thank you for the food
*Finishing up
*Doing the coloring
*Fan's Idea Character is Complete!
Wow, she drew this? Really?
That's awesome! Crazy!
Did the Director do it? No, I barely even touched it
Really!?
I've been drawing for 20 years now, And that work right there is not easy to draw
I can tell that she draws on her own time Or at least used to
It looks so pretty. I think it will go very well
*Tzuyang's transformation character is complete!
We will do our best to use this overview to make it into a live-character

*Fighting!
Fighting!
*The character's skills will be introduced on the next episode!
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
